The case studies area is organized around industry application clusters to support project storytelling, reference building and lead qualification.

Projects

Project-Oriented Terminal References

A project section that combines real industrial imagery with application-specific text gives buyers a quicker read on where Hanlong systems are deployed.

Project 01

Oil & Gas Terminals

Marine loading arms, safe mooring systems and berth safety equipment for crude oil and refined product transfer.

Project 02

Chemical & Petrochemical

Safe and efficient handling of hazardous and specialty chemicals.

Project 03

Marine & Bulk Terminals

Engineered for diverse cargoes and demanding marine operations.

Suzhou Hanlong Petrochemical Equipment Co., LTD

Professional manufacturer for fluid handling equipment, petrochemical machinery, port machinery and marine safety systems.
